ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A. TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF BANK OF AMERICAS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100067489) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF CLAIMS AGAINST THE DEFENDANT. ALL CAUSES OF ACTION SHALL BE CLEARLY LABELED AND ALL ALLEGATIONS MUST BE MADE IN CLEAR AND CONCISE LANGUAGE. THE COURT NOTES THAT PLAINTIFF'S HANDWRITING IS ILLEGIBLE MAKING IT DIFFICULT TO UNDERSTAND THE MINIMAL ALLEGATIONS CURRENTLY CONTAINED IN THE COMPLAINT. FURTHER, UNLESS ANY AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTAINS A REAL PROPERTY CLAIM, ALL FUTURE MOTIONS SHALL BE MADE IN DEPARTMENT 302. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2019 Continued To Oct-02-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2019 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Tara Mohseni, Esq. of Severson & Werson, T: 415.677.5617, defendant/ moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance by plaintiff in pro per, and objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT as follows:

Sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Continued To Aug-21-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James Sales (415-637-6019) Plaintiff/opposing party in pro per.
No other appearances.

Discussed re: Compliance with Tentative Ruling Rule, Court explains tentative ruling.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of claims against the Defendant. All causes of action shall be clearly labeled and all allegations must be made in clear and concise language. The Court notes that Plaintiff's handwriting is illegible making it difficult to understand the minimal allegations currently contained in the Complaint. Further, unless any amended complaint contains a real property claim, all future motions shall be made in department 302.

Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2019 Continued To May-22-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
